current_extraction.notes: Captured the malegislature.gov bill-search snapshot for 'artificial intelligence'. Massachusetts has many pending AI bills (H.83 et al) but no single enacted comprehensive AI law as of acquisition date. This entry is an intentional tracker/index document, not a single law. When MA enacts a comprehensive AI law, that should become a sibling directory with its own name; this directory remains as the live tracker.
